entity.summary: Indonesian centralized crypto-asset exchange officially launched in September 2018, registered with Bappebti in November 2019, and granted a full Pedagang Fisik Aset Kripto licence in September 2024.
entity.notes: The launch date is refined from a year-level 2018 marker to September 2018 using Tokocrypto's official litepaper; September 1 is used as a month-level marker. The November 2019 registration and September 2024 PFAK licence are historical Bappebti milestones and do not imply that the regulator remains unchanged after Indonesia's later supervisory transition.

expected.summary: Indonesia-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Tokocrypto brand.

changes.summary: Indonesian centralized crypto-asset exchange officially launched in September 2018, registered with Bappebti in November 2019, and granted a full Pedagang Fisik Aset Kripto licence in September 2024.
changes.notes: The launch date is refined from a year-level 2018 marker to September 2018 using Tokocrypto's official litepaper; September 1 is used as a month-level marker. The November 2019 registration and September 2024 PFAK licence are historical Bappebti milestones and do not imply that the regulator remains unchanged after Indonesia's later supervisory transition.

events.title: Tokocrypto officially launched in September 2018
events.description: Tokocrypto's official litepaper records that the Indonesian crypto-asset exchange officially launched in September 2018.
events.notes: The source establishes the month but not an exact day, so September 1 is used as a month-level marker.

events.title: Tokocrypto registered with Bappebti in November 2019
events.description: Tokocrypto became the first entity in Indonesia registered under the country's Commodity Futures Trading Regulatory Agency in November 2019.
events.notes: November 1 is used as a month-level marker because the official source does not state the exact registration day.

events.title: Tokocrypto announced full PFAK licensing
events.description: Tokocrypto announced that it had obtained a full Pedagang Fisik Aset Kripto licence from Bappebti after operating as a prospective registered trader since 2019.
events.notes: The announcement date is used as the public event marker.

evidence.title: TKO Token Litepaper V2
evidence.notes: The official litepaper states that Tokocrypto officially launched in September 2018.

evidence.title: TKO Token Litepaper V2
evidence.notes: The official litepaper states that Tokocrypto registered with Bappebti in November 2019.

evidence.title: Tokocrypto Raih Lisensi PFAK: Tonggak Baru Industri Kripto Indonesia
evidence.notes: The official announcement records full PFAK licensing after the earlier prospective registration phase.

evidence.title: Tokocrypto official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies current exchange operation.
